title: claytonia floribunda
intro: Claytonia floribunda, also known as Miners Lettuce or Spring Beauty, is a flowering plant species native to the western coast of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including sore throats, skin irritations, and digestive problems, due to its ability to provide relief from inflammation and infection. In herbal preparations, Claytonia floribunda is often made into teas, salves, and infusions, and is also used as a food source in salads and as a nutritious green.
